overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking along a futuristic elevated pedestrian walkway at night, transitioning into an indoor commercial corridor lined with digital billboards. The environment features wet reflective surfaces, neon lighting, and cyberpunk architecture with a mix of outdoor and indoor sections.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated pedestrian walkway between corporate towers

events.description: approaching the entrance to the indoor corridor from the outdoor elevated walkway

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet reflective elevated walkway, passing illuminated billboards and glass railings

notable_agents.action: person in blue clothing walking ahead in the same direction toward the building entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated advertisement for CIRRUS with red and white text on black background
transparent glass railing with metal frame along the edge of the elevated walkway
covered roof structure with circular ventilation units and linear lighting
tall modern building with illuminated glass windows and neon signage

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along an elevated outdoor walkway at night in a cyberpunk city. The wet tiled floor reflects the neon lights from a large CIRRUS billboard on the left and the glass corporate building on the right. The walkway is covered overhead but open on the sides, with a glass safety railing visible. A pedestrian in blue walks ahead in the distance as the camera approaches an indoor entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor transit corridor with digital advertising displays

events.description: entering the enclosed indoor corridor from the outdoor walkway, lighting shifts to warm artificial
navigating past a standing NPC near the vending machine while continuing forward

agents.ego_description: walking through the indoor corridor, passing digital billboards and benches, navigating past pedestrians

notable_agents.action: person in yellow jacket standing near the vending machine, facing the billboard
person sitting on a bench against the yellow wall

entered.detail: walls covered in yellow-orange tiles with wood paneling sections and large digital billboards
large illuminated advertisement showing a woman in purple with MIX IT UP and 16 FLAVORS text
blue billboard with Japanese text and Smasher branding featuring a boxing image
tall cylindrical purple vending machine with illuminated product display
metal and wood benches along the corridor walls where NPCs are seated
ceiling with linear fluorescent light fixtures and dark rectangular ventilation panels

segments.scene_description: The camera enters an indoor corridor with yellow-tiled walls and bright artificial lighting. Large digital billboards advertise various products including 'MIX IT UP' and 'Smasher'. The floor remains reflective tiled surface. A purple vending machine stands against the left wall, while benches line the right wall where an NPC sits. The camera passes a standing NPC in a yellow jacket near the vending machine as it continues down the corridor toward a distant doorway or elevator at the end.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a rain-slicked outdoor walkway into a brightly lit indoor commercial corridor. It begins by gliding along an elevated path at night, where the wet tiled floor reflects the glow of a large CIRRUS billboard and a neighboring glass corporate building. As the camera approaches a distant pedestrian in blue, the scene shifts from the open-air environment into an enclosed hallway characterized by yellow-tiled walls and intense artificial lighting. The perspective then moves past a purple vending machine and a seated NPC, passing beneath large digital advertisements for Smasher and Mix It Up. The movement finally carries the camera deeper into the reflective corridor toward a distant doorway at the far end.
